name: Croc's World Construction Kit
short_description: Play and create custom levels of Croc's World! You can publish them on the internet and other players can play them as well!
detailed_description:
Play and create custom levels of Croc's World! You can publish them on the internet and other players can play them as well!

Crocs World Construction Kit features 4 different Settings and numerous tiles that can be used to create your own levels! Share them if you like via internet and let other people play your levels!
about_the_game:
Play and create custom levels of Croc's World! You can publish them on the internet and other players can play them as well!

Crocs World Construction Kit features 4 different Settings and numerous tiles that can be used to create your own levels! Share them if you like via internet and let other people play your levels!
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Danish, Finnish, Greek, Japanese, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Swedish, Czech, Turkish
